bonus_findings: S2S dev-mode bypass has no production guard (empty string edge case)
Feature flag plan type mismatch (lowercase 'pro' vs uppercase 'PRO')
Agent loop has no token budget or consecutive-failure circuit breaker
checkAgentQuota failsafe-open grants unlimited quota on billing failure
false_positive: Phase 1 said 'Dependencies: catalog-pinned, consistent' — actually 9 packages pin Zod v3 while catalog pins v4
improvements_over_v1: Found NS-002 (RLS not enforced) — both v1 harness and baseline missed this
Found NS-012 (saga idempotency) as full match with Stripe idempotencyKey code
No false positive on phantom schemas (eliminated by verification requirement)
Two-phase structure visible in output (Phase 1 scan table + Phase 2 depth)
